title: chrysophyllum marginatum var. obversum
intro: Chrysophyllum marginatum var. obversum, also known as the West African star apple, is a variety of the Chrysophyllum marginatum tree that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of the West African star apple include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where its leaves are boiled in water to create a herbal tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
